questionHtml: Suggest, with a reason, how the activity of the sloth varies with ambient temperature.
markschemeHtml:
1. the sloth will be more active at higher temperatures as it takes in more food for energy;
  2. as temperature rises, the sloth uncurls to dissipate/lose heat;

Reason required.

meta.title: Suggest, with a reason, how the activity of the sloth varies with ambient temperature.
